message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  ArrowColor Black
  BorderColor Black
  FontColor Black
  FontName Arial
  FontSize 12
}

class "Team" as Team {
  o name: string
  o description: string
  o ownerId: User
  o participants: Participant[]
  o topics: Topic[]
}

class "Topic" as Topic {
  o name: string
  o icon: string
  o isSequential: boolean
  o subtopics: Subtopic[]
}

class "Subtopic" as Subtopic {
  o name: string
  o description: string
  o challenges: Challenge[]
}

class "Challenge" as Challenge {
  o name: string
  o body: string
  o type: ChallengeType
  o selection: string[]
  o correct: string[]
  o points: number
  o feedback: string
}

class "ChallengeType" as ChallengeType {
  INPUT
  RADIO
  CHECKBOX
}

class "Participant" as Participant {
  o userId: User
  o points: number
  o status: ParticipantStatus
}

class "ParticipantStatus" as ParticipantStatus {
  PENDING
  ACCEPTED
  DISABLED
}

class "User" as User {
  o name: string
  o email: string
  o educationalInstitution: string
  o educationalBackground: EducationalBackground
  o birthDate: Date
  o points: number
}

class "EducationalBackground" as EducationalBackground {
  MIDDLE_INCOMPLETE
  MIDDLE_ONGOING
  MIDDLE_COMPLETE
  HIGH_INCOMPLETE
  HIGH_ONGOING
  HIGH_COMPLETE
  GRADUATION_INCOMPLETE
  GRADUATION_ONGOING
  GRADUATION_COMPLETE
}

class "ChallengeReport" as ChallengeReport {
  o userId: User
  o challengeId: Challenge
  o answer: string[]
  o answeredCorrectly: boolean
}

Team --|> Topic : 1..*
Team --|> Participant : 1..*
Topic --|> Subtopic : 1..*
Subtopic --|> Challenge : 1..*
Challenge --|> ChallengeType : 1
Participant --|> ParticipantStatus : 1
User --|> EducationalBackground : 1
ChallengeReport --|> User : 1
ChallengeReport --|> Challenge : 1

@enduml
